summary: Iteration 169: Full testing of new Personale module. All 19 backend API tests pass (Dipendenti CRUD, Presenze CRUD with bulk insert, Documenti, Report with PDF generation). Frontend PersonalePage loads correctly with 4 tabs, sidebar shows 'Personale' under 'Produzione' group, all UI interactions work.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

critical_code_review_comments: Personale module implementation is complete and functional
All CRUD operations for dipendenti, presenze, documenti work correctly
Soft delete pattern used for dipendenti (attivo=false) is correct
Presenze POST endpoint has upsert behavior - updates if same date+dipendente exists
Report PDF generation with WeasyPrint works
Report settings (schedula) validation correctly rejects invalid inputs
All endpoints require authentication (401 returned without auth)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 4 tabs load, dialogs work, buttons clickable)

seed_data_creation: Created test user for API testing. Cleanup deactivated TEST_ prefixed dipendenti after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Personale module fully tested. API endpoints: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/personale/dipendenti, GET/POST /api/personale/presenze (with bulk), GET/POST /api/personale/documenti (with upload), GET /api/personale/report/mensile, GET /api/personale/report/pdf, GET/POST /api/personale/report/impostazioni/schedula. Frontend has 4 tabs all working.

test_features_verified.GET /api/personale/dipendenti (with auth: PASSED - Returns list with dipendenti array and total
test_features_verified.POST /api/personale/dipendenti: PASSED - Creates new dipendente with dipendente_id
test_features_verified.GET /api/personale/presenze: PASSED - Returns presenze with filters (mese, dipendente_id)
test_features_verified.POST /api/personale/presenze/bulk: PASSED - Inserts multiple days at once
test_features_verified.GET /api/personale/report/mensile: PASSED - Returns aggregated report per dipendente
test_features_verified.Dipendenti tab: PASSED - Table and Add button visible
test_features_verified.Report tab: PASSED - PDF download and Email send buttons visible
